mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_MEMBER (name, nickname, phoneNumber, role) VALUES (#{name}, #{nickname}, #{phoneNumber}, #{role})
INSERT INTO SAAS_LOGIN (email, pw, memberNo) VALUES (#{email}, #{pw}, #{memberNo})
mapper.select: SELECT email as email , pw as pw , loginNo as loginNo , memberNo AS memberNo FROM SAAS_LOGIN WHERE email = #{email}
